scripts.dev: npm run dev:clean && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$projectPath = (Get-Location).Path; $ports = 5000,5173,5174,5175; $portPids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; $projectNodePids = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like ('*' + $projectPath + '*') } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty ProcessId -Unique; $pids = @($portPids + $projectNodePids | Sort-Object -Unique); if ($pids.Count -gt 0) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host ('Stopped PID(s): ' + ($pids -join ', ')) } else { Write-Host 'No stale project listeners/processes found' }"
